description.en: The Bactrian camel is a large, two-humped mammal that has been a mainstay of transport along the Silk Road for centuries.
description.zh: 双峰骆驼是一种长有两个驼峰的大型哺乳动物，几个世纪以来一直是丝绸之路上主要的运输工具。

anatomy.en: They have two humps and a very thick, shaggy coat that protects them from the bitter cold of Central Asian winters. Their broad feet help them walk across rocky terrain and shifting sands.
anatomy.zh: 它们有两个驼峰和非常厚实蓬松的皮毛，能保护它们免受中亚严冬的酷寒。宽大的脚掌能帮助它们在崎岖地形和流沙中稳步行走。

ecology_and_behavior.en: These camels are incredibly resilient, enduring temperatures from -40°C in winter to 40°C in summer. They are primarily domesticated and used for carrying heavy loads across long distances.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 这些骆驼极具韧性，能忍受从冬季 -40°C 到夏季 40°C 的气温。它们主要被人类驯养，用于长途搬运重物。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Domesticated Bactrian camels are found throughout Central Asia, from the steppes of Mongolia to the mountains of Afghanistan and Western China.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 家养双峰骆驼分布在整个中亚地区，从蒙古草原到阿富汗以及中国西部的山脉。
